title: GoodhartSentinel: auto-pause when dev/holdout gap widens monotonically 3 iterations
goal: Implement the Goodhart sentinel per AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS: auto-pause the self-improvement loop when the dev-vs-holdout PASS-rate gap widens monotonically for 3 consecutive accepted iterations. A pause emits a typed receipt that the loop scheduler (MT-156) treats as a hard stop until operator unpause.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/goodhart_sentinel.rs (GoodhartSentinel + SentinelDecision + SentinelHistory + SentinelReceipt types). Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/goodhart_sentinel_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-148 (loop core), MT-151 (evaluator), MT-152 (promotion floor) all land.
implementation_notes: Per AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS: 'Goodhart sentinel (auto-pause if dev/holdout gap widens monotonically 3 iterations)'. The sentinel observes (dev_pass_rate, holdout_pass_rate) for each ACCEPTED iteration. The gap is `dev_pass_rate - holdout_pass_rate`. 'Monotonically widens' means the gap is strictly greater than the previous iteration's gap, sustained across 3 consecutive accepted iterations. Surface: `pub struct GoodhartSentinel;` with `pub fn evaluate(history: &SentinelHistory, latest: &EvalResult) -> SentinelDecision`. SentinelHistory: `{ entries: VecDeque<SentinelEntry> }` (bounded; only the most recent 10 entries are kept). SentinelEntry: `{ iteration_number, dev_pass_rate, holdout_pass_rate, gap, accepted_at_utc }`. SentinelDecision: `{ Continue, Pause { reason: PauseReason, receipt: SentinelReceipt } }`. PauseReason: `MonotonicGapWidening { gaps: Vec<f64>, iteration_numbers: Vec<u32> }`. SentinelReceipt: `{ receipt_id: Uuid v7, paused_at_utc, fr_event_kind: "FR-EVT-GOODHART-PAUSE", history_snapshot: SentinelHistory }`. Pause emits FR-EVT-GOODHART-PAUSE via the FEMS flight recorder; scheduler (MT-156) reads the receipt and refuses to schedule further iterations until operator runs `unpause_loop` IPC (MT-155). Tests: sentinel returns Continue for 1-2 widening iterations; returns Pause on the 3rd consecutive widening; resets the counter on a narrowing iteration; tolerates equal gaps (not strictly widening); bounded history truncates at 10 entries; receipt round-trips through serde.
risk_if_missed: Without the Goodhart sentinel the loop can run unbounded while overfitting dev at the cost of holdout; promotion floor alone catches single regressions but not slow monotonic drift.
validator_focus: Sentinel is pure (no I/O). Strict monotonic widening required (equal gaps reset counter). Pause receipt is durable and routes through FEMS flight recorder.

lifecycle.claim_note: Paired D.2 claim with MT-152; MT-152 transitioning in same session.
lifecycle.ready_for_validation_note: goodhart_sentinel.rs implementation verified by sub-agent; 21 integration tests at tests/goodhart_sentinel_tests.rs cover monotonic widening over 3 iterations triggers FR-EVT-GOODHART-PAUSE, non-monotonic / oscillating / stable-gap / narrowing-then-widening / earlier-burst-doesn't-leak / epsilon-widening / zero-delta edge cases, bounded ring buffer truncation, sentinel pause + LoopIpcState integration (sticky AlreadyPaused, operator unpause clears state and allows re-pause, empty rationale rejected leaves pause sticky), entry_from_eval signed-gap behavior, history immutability under .evaluate(), and SentinelDecision serde round-trip. All 21 integration tests pass; 7 inline lib tests still pass. classification: IMPLEMENTATION_SUPPORTING_EVIDENCE_ONLY_NOT_INTEGRATION_VALIDATOR_PASS.

minimum_controls: Strict monotonic widening required; equal gaps reset the counter to prevent false positives on stable runs.
Pause receipt is durable and tracked by the scheduler so unpause requires operator IPC.
Bounded history prevents unbounded memory growth across long-lived loop instances.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: GoodhartSentinel implements strict-monotonic widening over 3 transitions with the contracted SentinelDecision/PauseReason/SentinelReceipt shape. Equal-gap-resets and history bounded at 10 entries are enforced. FR-EVT-GOODHART-PAUSE constant exposed. 21 integration + 7 inline tests pass per builder evidence. The sentinel is pure (no I/O) as required. Two notes: receipt.fr_event_kind is a String rather than const-borrowed (cheap-but-tolerable runtime alloc) and the iteration_number sequencing for the latest entry is heuristic (caller-driven), creating an off-by-one risk if the caller forgets to append the entry before re-invoking evaluate.
